frontier.hypothesis: The rich-pass permuter sampler (offset-0 workspace, vT40 base) remains the only untried honest lever with search coverage outside the hand-derivable structural axis. s8's KILL of the sibling-transplant angle strengthens the case that any masked <= 3 form must come from a non-obvious mutation the sampler stumbles onto — the s5 signposts (vP160 class at masked 3, 180 insns) prove the sampler CAN reach nominally sub-4 space.
frontier.mechanism: permuter's PERM_GENERAL/PERM_RANDOMIZE_TYPE mutations sample RTL-space more densely than hand-forensics; the s5 masked-3 signpost proves the sampler reaches sub-4 nominally but every route paid a visible byte or uninitialized read. A fresh long run WITHOUT the vP160-class (label-alive) attractor rejection may find a semantically-clean sub-4 form.
frontier.next_probe: permuter modality: rebuild offset-0 workspace from s6/dumps prelude scaffolding, seed with vT40 base, add PERM_* directives targeting the pair-window insns 106/117 (T-14 UID tie) and the region-3 check2-beqz slot; run --stop-on-zero with watcher auto-triaging sub-200 finds; reject all sub-4 finds that read status uninitialized OR add net insns.

frontier.hypothesis: The twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 (parked, dist 7) shares the pair-swap coupling by lore. If it closes FIRST (its residual is the pair exchange alone; masked ~6->0 on flip per pre-merge session-6f-6h commits), the lever mirrors here.
frontier.mechanism: cross-function — twin work is a separate grind entry, but any pair-exchange technique that lands there transfers directly to marionation_Exec's do_timeout region.
frontier.next_probe: Not this function's session. Recommend the driver route the queue such that cpu_side_move_dir_4 gets its own grind session before another marionation_Exec permuter campaign — per the fable-blitz 2026-07-07 strategic ruling in state.json.

judge_constraints: FINAL owner ruling 2026-07-06 (do-while-zero-exception.md): do-while(0) sanctioned for ANY codegen effect incl. RA weighting, mandatory inline FAKE annotation; nested wraps additionally need a single-level-insufficient justification. The interim not-sanctioned ruling is superseded. STILL FORBIDDEN: regfix, register pins, __asm__ injection, semantic-lie C (cross-symbol derivation, per 2026-07-05).

candidate.c = vT40 (masked 4, verified): layer-1 review round-3 verdict was PASS-except-one — the NESTED wrap at line ~111 was held NEEDS_USER at the time; under the FINAL ruling it needs a documented single-level-insufficient justification (vT44 battery was staged to eliminate it entirely — check evidence). The Judge must independently verify that justification or its elimination.

Residual gap is 2 root-caused items (see evidence: pair-swap @56/57 coupled fixed point — sched2 LUID tie + qty_compare 5.33v5.33 tie; wrap toolbox measured DEAD for this pair). Do NOT re-derive the 140-ordering sweep, the 9-variant topology sweep, or the cc1psx parity test — all closed negative. Active lever at handoff: rich-pass permuter on the vT40 base.

STRATEGY (fable-blitz 2026-07-07): develop the exchange lever on the CHEAPER twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 FIRST (its ip/g3 residual is the exchange alone; masked ~6->0 on flip), then mirror here. The decisive allocation-equation material is in pre-merge commits aa8cad24 cd65f9c2 e5aa2dd4 f4bc8e67 df749bfd 622620cb (sessions 6f-6h: in-place basin correction, final qty_compare equation, s4 half-flip) — NOT fully represented in this ledger's s1-s3; read those commits before another permuter campaign.
